title: BMI Calculator
desc: Calculate your Body Mass Index instantly with our free online BMI calculator. Supports metric and imperial units to determine your weight category and healthy range.

title: Body Fat Calculator
desc: Estimate your body fat percentage using the US Navy method. Enter height, neck, waist, and hip measurements to get instant results and fitness categories.

title: Calorie Calculator
desc: Calculate your daily calorie needs (TDEE) and BMR using the Mifflin-St Jeor formula. Get personalized targets for weight loss, maintenance, or muscle gain based on your activity level.

title: Heart Rate Zone Calculator
desc: Calculate 5 personalized heart rate training zones using the Karvonen formula or standard max heart rate method. Optimize your cardio workouts with precise target ranges for fat burn, endurance, and VO2 max.

title: Ideal Weight Calculator
desc: Calculate your ideal body weight using four proven formulas: Devine, Robinson, Miller, and Hamwi. Get instant results in kilograms and pounds alongside a healthy BMI range for comprehensive health insights.

title: Macro Calculator
desc: Calculate your daily macronutrient needs for protein, carbs, and fat based on calorie targets. Supports balanced, low-carb, keto, and high-protein diets with instant results.

title: Running Pace Calculator
desc: Calculate running pace, time, or distance instantly. Supports 5K, 10K, half marathon, and marathon distances with metric and imperial unit conversions for runners.
features: Calculate pace from time and distance
Compute total run time or distance

title: Water Intake Calculator
desc: Calculate your ideal daily water intake based on weight, exercise, and climate. Get personalized hydration goals in liters and cups to stay healthy and energized.

title: BAC Calculator
desc: Calculate Blood Alcohol Concentration (BAC). Estimate intoxication level based on drinks, weight, gender, time. Free BAC calculator.
features: Adjust for time elapsed since last drink

title: Batting Average Calculator
desc: Calculate baseball batting average, OBP, slugging. Track baseball stats. Free baseball statistics calculator.

desc: Calculate BMI and ideal body weight. Multiple formulas (Devine, Hamwi, Robinson, Miller). BMI categories and health risk. Free BMI calculator.

desc: Calculate Basal Metabolic Rate (BMR). Mifflin-St Jeor and Harris-Benedict equations. Daily calorie burn at rest. Free BMR calculator.
